final:
module top_module(
    input ce,
    input [8:1] ignore_data,
    input rw,
    output reg [8:1] leds
);always @(*) begin
    if (ce == 1'b0) begin
        leds = 8'b0;
    end else if (rw == 1'b0) begin
        leds = ignore_data;
    end else begin
        leds = leds;
    end
end

endmodule
